cookies.title: Cookies preferences
cookies.description: We use cookies to improve your experience, remember your preferences and understand traffic sources.

whatChanges.title: What this changes for you
whatChanges.item1: Remember a few useful preferences during your visit.
whatChanges.item2: Better understand how visitors discover Socially.
whatChanges.item3: Improve the experience over time without adding UI friction.

ifYouDecline.title: If you decline
ifYouDecline.item3: Some visit information will not be kept.

commitment.title: Our commitment
commitment.item1: No non-essential cookies are set before your consent.
commitment.item2: No ambiguous wording and no hidden choices.
commitment.item3: You will be able to change this decision later.

authRequiredDialog.title: Sign in to continue
authRequiredDialog.description: This action is reserved for signed-in members. Sign in or create an account to interact on Socially.

general.pageDescription: This page does not exist or is no longer available.
general.title: We could not find this page
general.description: The link may be incorrect, or the resource may have been moved or deleted.

profile.pageDescription: This profile does not exist or is no longer accessible.
profile.title: This profile could not be found
profile.description: The user may have changed their username, deleted their account, or this profile may no longer be visible.

post.pageDescription: This post does not exist or is no longer accessible.
post.title: This post could not be found
post.description: The post may have been deleted, moderated, or the link you followed may no longer be valid.

app.pageDescription: An error occurred while loading this section.
app.title: Something went wrong
app.description: This section could not be displayed correctly. You can retry without leaving the page.

description.signin: Sign in to continue to Socially.

request.title: Reset your password
request.description: Enter the email address for your account. If it exists, you will receive a reset link.

reset.title: Choose a new password

reset.invalidToken: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
reset.passwordTooShort: The password must contain at least 8 characters.
reset.passwordMismatch: The two passwords do not match.
reset.fallbackError: Unable to update your password right now.
